ruleContent.content:
<js>
var domain = result.match(/domain\s*=\s*['"](http[^'"]+)/)[1];
var thunderUrl = result.match(/thunder_url\s*=\s*['"]([^'"]+)/)[1];
domain + thunderUrl;
</js>
